The '''''Blood Gutter''''' was a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class cruiser]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. By [[7 ABY/Legends|7.5 ABY]], the ''Blood Gutter'' was a part of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s fleet.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}}
